examples.title: System Testing Pseudocode
examples.description: A pseudocode example of system testing.
examples.code:
IF system testing THEN
  PERFORM black box testing
  PERFORM white box testing
  PERFORM gray box testing
ENDIF
examples.explanation: This pseudocode example illustrates the concept of system testing and its different components.

examples.title: Black Box Testing Java Example
examples.description: A Java example of black box testing.
examples.explanation: This Java example illustrates the concept of black box testing and how it works.

examples.title: White Box Testing Python Example
examples.description: A Python example of white box testing.
examples.code:
def white_box_testing(input):
  # Known internal workings
  return input * 2
input = 5
output = white_box_testing(input)
print(output)
examples.explanation: This Python example illustrates the concept of white box testing and how it works.
